use_cases: Mobile navigation menu open/close toggle with smooth rotation animation
Responsive navbar hamburger icon for sidebar drawers
Navigation drawer trigger with visual state feedback via stroke animation
Minimalist icon control for any interface requiring menu visibility toggling
ai_summary: A hamburger menu toggle icon component that transforms with a smooth 45-degree rotation and animated stroke dash array when toggled between open and closed states. Designed as a lightweight SVG primitive for responsive navigation controls, working seamlessly across desktop and mobile interfaces.
